steps.title: Find the key temporal clue
steps.content: The notes state that Chrysalis “would likely have come very close to Saturn around 160 million years ago.”

steps.title: Match the meaning to the notes
steps.content:
Choice C places the events in the correct order: Chrysalis approached Saturn about 160 million years ago, tidal forces broke it apart, and the debris formed the rings.

The other choices either reverse the cause, omit the timing, or leave out the formation of the rings.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
